description_long: This is a modern, high-back lounge chair with a distinctive, sculpted form and wide, angled armrests. The chair is upholstered in a brown leather-like material featuring a diamond-stitched pattern with light-colored thread, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing comfort and ergonomic support. The armrests are integrated into the main body and curve outward, supported by a sleek, black metal frame that also forms the four slender legs. The legs are slightly splayed, enhancing stability and adding to the chair's stylish, industrial aesthetic. This chair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor patios.
description: A modern brown leather lounge chair with diamond stitching, wide padded armrests, and a black metal frame with four splayed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat, high backrest, and prominent diamond-stitched pattern with outward-curving armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's deep seat, thick cushioning, and the curvature of the backrest and armrest, as well as the slender metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest and the diamond-stitched pattern, with the metal frame visible supporting the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the ergonomic contour of the seat and backrest, and the outward angle of the armrest and legs.
